thoughts_plan__task_specification_435885.content: When task.md specifies exact verbatim text to insert, the plan must use that exact string — paraphrasing or rephrasing is a spec violation, even if the meaning is similar.

facts_plan_authoring_435886602841.content: The plan text should be a direct copy-paste of the task specification text, not a reformulation with the same meaning.

thoughts_task_execution_515774556390.content: When a task specifies exact verbatim text (e.g. a one-line note), the plan and implementation must reproduce that exact string — substituting with a semantically similar but different wording causes t

facts_taskpayload_review_515775821437.content: A plan that deviates from the task's exact wording (even for a simple one-line insert) creates a mismatch that will fail automated review checks.

thoughts_readmemd_552377051741.content: The agent committed changes to .kody/ and .agents/ artifacts but never touched README.md — a common sign the implementation step ran but failed to identify or edit the actual target file.

thoughts_readmemd_591899578730.content: Simple file edits can fail silently — previous commit only touched skill files and artifacts, leaving README.md untouched despite planning to edit it.

facts_file_modification_591900886978.content: When a task says 'modify X', the fix must literally modify X on disk. Verify with `git diff` or file read before assuming the edit succeeded.

conventions_general_623964852048.content: Commit `18c9f2d` correctly inserted the exact task-specified line into `README.md` at line 3, directly under the title. The README now reads:

conventions_general_623966959367.content: > v0.4.0: Configuration now uses unified `provider/model` strings instead of separate provider + model fields.

conventions_general_623968968722.content: The inserted line is a **verbatim match** of the task specification: `> v0.4.0: Configuration now uses unified \`provider/model\` strings instead of separate provider + model fields.`

thoughts_readmemd_710430695507.content: The plan suggested a different line than the task specified. The plan used 'HISTORY' prefix and CHANGELOG link, but the task required a specific verbatim line. The agent correctly used the task-specif
